headline: Spotting Winners: Mondelez (NASDAQ:MDLZ) And Shelf-Stable Food Stocks In Q1
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Mondelez (NASDAQ:MDLZ) and the best and worst performers in the shelf-stable food industry.

headline: Junk food crackdown making Britain less attractive, warns Cadbury owner
summary: The boss of the confectionery giant behind Cadbury and Toblerone has warned that Labour’s crackdown on junk food is putting investment in Britain at risk.

raw.headline: Junk food crackdown making Britain less attractive, warns Cadbury owner

headline: Mondelez CEO appointed AB InBev chairman
summary: Dirk Van de Put has been an AB InBev director since April 2023.
